sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28902" key="duse/kruptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσέκ-ρυπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to wash out</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
